allow: Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no umbrel@192.168.1.213 'timeout 3 bash -c ""</dev/tcp/10.21.21.8/8332"" 2>&1 && echo ""RPC PORT OPEN"" || echo ""RPC PORT CLOSED""')
